items.content: A vulnerability was found in CADImage Plugin on IrfanView. It has been classified as critical. Affected is an unknown function of the component DWG File Parser. The manipulation leads to memory corruption. This vulnerability is traded as CVE-2025-7295. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. There is no exploit available. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component.

items.title: CVE-2025-6759 | Citrix Virtual Apps and Desktops up to 2502/2402 LTSR CU2 Windows Virtual Delivery Agent for CVAD/DaaS privileges management (CTX694820)
items.author: vuldb.com
